violations.text: Chowder , which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Per PIC, chowder was prepared last night. Chowder was disposed of. Per PIC, new cooling procedures will be used, including using shallow hotel pans. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

ROP tuna was observed thawing with the package still in tact. Fish was observed at 36 degrees. ROP seafood must be removed ENTIRELY BEFORE thawing process. Proper thawing procedures reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The self service salad bar and self service hot bar are lacking required allergen information. Proper labeling reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the bakery kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the side wall next to the grill/meat prep area has an accumulation of dust and grease. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Various foods were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC recently stocked product. Product was relocated. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Various products packaged in the food establishment are lacking adequate labels. ALLERGEN INFORMATION IS LACKING. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, allergens, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Various foods were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC recently stocked product. Product was relocated. Establishment will receive deeper pans tomorrow and will use those pans going forward. Establishment to continue monitoring product is case. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

Various products packaged in the food establishment are lacking adequate labels. Allergen information was lacking. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, allergens, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Various foods were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit in the self service area. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC all food was stocked in the morning (less than 4 hours ago.) All food was relocated to walk-In. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
ROP lobster was thawing with package in tact. Lobster was @ 35 degrees. Lobster was sliced open. Proper thawing procedures reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Baked goods packaged in the food establishment are lacking proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC stated new labels will be printed. FOOD (self service salad bar) that is available for CONSUMER shall be prominently labeled with the following information in plain view of the CONSUMER: 1. The common name of the FOOD, or absent a common name, an adequately descriptive identity statement; 2. If made from two or more ingredients, a list of ingredients in descending order of predominance by weight, including a declaration of artificial color or flavor and chemical preservatives, if contained in the FOOD 3.The name of the FOOD source for each MAJOR FOOD ALLERGEN contained in the FOOD unless the FOOD source is already part of the common or usual name of the respective ingredient. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Italian wedding soup and coleslaw packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels with a list of ingredients. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023

The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The door of the ice machine was observed missing 2) Gaskets of the walk-in cooler doors 3) The metal sheet floors of the outdoor walk-in freezer observed to be pitted. - PIC has work order in for items to be repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

A soap dispenser was observed at the food prep sink in the bakery. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with the handwashing aids and devices required for a handwashing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. Date of when last shellstock from the container/bag is sold is lacking. Shellstock tags not kept in chronological order correlated to the date that is recorded on the tag or label. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

Pork pie, shrimp scampi, soups and other food items were observed held at 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit in the white and black open air coolers. The white open air cooler was observed with an ambient temperature 49 degrees Fahrenheit. The black open air cooler was observed fluctuating between 40-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items placed in the units under 3 hours were moved to walk-in refrigerator. Items left in unit over night were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

Reduced oxygen packaged tuna and lobster were observed thawing with the package in tact in the walk-in cooler. Internal temperature of food items were 37 degrees Fahrenheit. Person in charge opened packages to allow foods to thaw properly in the walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

Baked goods and prepared foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels with a list of ingredients. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The door of the ice machine was observed missing 2) Gaskets of the walk-in cooler doors 3) The metal sheet of the outdoor walk-in freezer observed to be pitted. 4) The white open air cooler observed with an ambient temperature of 49 degrees Fahrenheit. 5) The black open air cooler observed fluctuating between 40-47 degrees Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan in the walk-in cooler, bakery freezer, and honeycomb vents of the open air coolers throughout the retail area have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

The ice machine was observed with an air break. The ice machine must have an air-gap. Providing an air gap between the water supply outlet and the flood level rim of a plumbing fixture or equipment prevents contamination that may be caused by backflow. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
The the ceiling tiles in the front service area is in poor repair (water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2023
